title: eryngium campestre subsp. contractum
intro: Eryngium campestre subsp. contractum, also known as the compact field eryngium, is a subspecies of the field eryngium plant, which is a type of flowering plant in the family Apiaceae. The plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as coughs and bronchitis, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Eryngium campestre subsp. contractum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of colds and flu. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used in teas, infusions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
